description: Designpowers shared core registry — the single source of truth every surface loads. Surfaces (Antigravity plugin Skills; the secondary ADK runner) contain no design logic; they read this manifest to discover agents, their contracts/personas, the evidence schema they must emit, and the MCP truth-layer servers they need. All paths are relative to the repository root.

designpowers-accessibility.description: WCAG truth layer: colour contrast (2.2), reading level (3.1.5), touch-target size (2.5.8/2.5.5), and motion safety (2.2.2/2.3.1/2.3.3). Returns measured evidence, not estimates.

design-strategist.description: Upstream thinking — flows, IA, journey maps, personas, principles, direction.

design-scout.description: Competitive/inclusion research and benchmarking; measures contrast when auditing competitors.

inspiration-scout.description: Aesthetic and interaction references matched to the brief and taste profile.

design-lead.description: Visual design execution; measures every colour choice against WCAG before handoff.

motion-designer.description: Motion and animation with reduced-motion safety commitments.

content-writer.description: Interface copy in plain language with cognitive accessibility built in.

design-builder.description: Builds production output from specs; measures the contrast of its OWN rendered output.

accessibility-critic.description: Reviews output for inclusive design, backing every contrast claim with measured evidence from the WCAG MCP tool. The reference v2 agent.

model_hints.why: Vision lets the critic read colours off a screenshot to propose pairs; large context lets it ingest a whole DESIGN.md palette. Both only PROPOSE what to measure — the MCP tool supplies the truth.

design-critic.description: Reviews craft/brief/plan/principles; measures contrast only where a craft point is contrast-checkable.

heuristic-evaluator.description: Nielsen's 10 heuristics + cognitive walkthroughs; measures touch-target size (2.5.8) via the truth tool.
